title: NetworkVerifierOutput
description: Output from the deterministic Network Verifier module.

api_calls_total.description: Total number of API calls made during the session.

api_calls_matched_codeintel.description: Number of API calls that matched an endpoint documented in codeintel.

api_calls_unmatched.description: Number of API calls that did not match any codeintel endpoint.

api_errors_during_normal_flow.description: Number of API errors (4xx/5xx) that occurred during normal (non-error-test) flows.

auth_token_set_after_auth.description: Whether an auth token was observed to be set after the authentication step.

auth_token_sent_on_protected_requests.description: Whether the auth token was sent on requests to protected endpoints.

auth_persists_after_refresh.description: Whether the auth session persisted after a page refresh.

deal_breakers.description: Critical issues that constitute deal-breakers for the session.

issues.description: Non-critical issues observed during network verification.

per_endpoint.description: Per-endpoint breakdown of network verification results.

method.description: HTTP method of the request (e.g. GET, POST, PUT, DELETE).

path.description: URL path of the endpoint (may be templated, e.g. /api/users/{id}).

matched_codeintel.description: Whether this endpoint was matched against a codeintel definition.

status.description: HTTP status code observed in the response.

expected_status.description: HTTP status code expected per codeintel or spec.

contract_match.description: Whether the response matched the codeintel contract (shape, status, etc.).

auth_check.description: Result of auth verification for this endpoint (e.g. 'N/A (public endpoint)', 'PASS', 'FAIL').
